scripts.build: npm run check:tracking && vite build --mode development
scripts.build:prod: npm run check:tracking && vite build --mode production --outDir dist-prod
scripts.zip: npm run build:prod && cd dist-prod && zip -r ../super-ltc-extension.zip . && cd .. && echo 'Created super-ltc-extension.zip'
scripts.build:store: npm run check:tracking && POSTHOG_KEY=phc_PLACEHOLDER vite build --mode store
scripts.zip:store: npm run build:store && rm -f super-ltc-store.zip && cd dist-store && zip -r ../super-ltc-store.zip . -x 'update-super-ltc*' 'install-auto-updater.bat' 'uninstall-auto-updater.bat' && cd .. && echo 'Created super-ltc-store.zip (Chrome Web Store ready)'
